title: Rentals
excerpt: Everyone knows that Camp Barney Medintz provides the most meaningful and exciting Jewish summer camp experience. Did you also know that you can celebrate your special occasions here too? contentHtml:
Everyone knows that Camp Barney Medintz provides the most meaningful and exciting Jewish summer camp experience. Did you also know that you can celebrate your special occasions here too?

Whether you are celebrating Shabbat, a Jewish lifecycle event, or another meaningful occasion, the Zaban Chapel is the ideal setting. When it is time to eat, our Kosher food service allows you to choose anything from an upscale menu to comfort food. The options for accommodations are plentiful. You and your guests have a choice of cabins, the health center, the lake house, and the staff lodge. When it is time to have some fun, the lakes, the beach, and the pools await.

Rentals are available after the camp season ends through September.

For more information on renting Camp Barney Medintz for your special occasion, please contact our rentals department at rentals@atlantajcc.org.
contentText:
